title: Mushroom Island Density
description: This datapack adds density to Mushroom Islands, giving them mountains and rivers!
body: This project adds Density to Mushroom Islands, giving them mountains and rivers. Specifically, it flips the Density function offset on its head below -1.05 Continentalness, giving Mushroom Islands their own Density! As of the latest version, it also gives Factor and Jaggedness, giving swamp terrain, shattered terrain, and jagged-looking peaks!
